response.justification: Bogdan brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and demonstrated ability to work with distributed systems at scale, but carries significant gaps for this role: no C++ work in 10 years (last role 2014-2015), no Rust fallback, and no navigation or routing systems experience. His career trajectory has been firmly in web/full-stack development. While his fundamentals are strong and he's a quick learner across domains, rebuilding C++ proficiency and learning routing-specific patterns would require substantial ramp-up time for a role needing immediate depth.
strengths: Direct geospatial data platform experience (GIS Collective, Green Map, open-source Geo-Data platform) — a domain match that's hard to find
Proven ability to work at systems scale: led data integration handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby with microservices architecture
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD practitioner, maintains code quality, teaches workshops on systems concepts — signals disciplined problem-solving
concerns: No C++ work in 10 years (last role Dec 2014–June 2015); would need to rebuild fluency in the primary language from scratch
No routing or navigation systems background — geospatial data collection is tangential but not navigation guidance, which has different optimization priorities and domain knowledge
Career momentum is web/full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, React for past decade) — represents a significant shift back toward systems-level C++ engineering
